title: AN ACT RENAMING THE TUMANA BRIDGE IN MARIKINA CITY AS GIL FERNANDO BRIDGE

chunks.text:
H. No. 4798; 105 OG No. 40, 5990 (October 5, 2009)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9684, August 04, 2009 ]

AN ACT RENAMING THE TUMANA BRIDGE IN MARIKINA CITY AS GIL FERNANDO BRIDGE

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representative of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Tumana Bridge in Barangay Tumana, City of Marikina shall hereafter be known as Gil Fernando Bridge.

SEC. 2. The Department of Public Works and Highways shall issue the necessary rules, orders and circulars to implement the provision of this Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JUAN PONCE ENRILE

(Sgd.) PROSPERO C. NOGRALES

President of Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on September 2, 2008 and May 25, 2009, respectively.

(Sgd.) EMMA LIRIO-REYES

(Sgd.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary of Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: AUG 04 2009

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL - ARROYO

President of the Philippines
